qa_pairs.task_instruction: I need to bond these paper edges together permanently to assemble the model. Which tool should I use?
My hands are sticky from the craft glue. What item can I use to clean them?
I need to make precise, straight incisions in the paper template. Which tool on the right side of the table is best for this?
I want to add a decorative, colored element to the white model. Which object should I pick up?
I need to trim some excess paper quickly. Which tool is the person holding?
Which item on the far right could be used to temporarily hold paper in place?
